target_skill.name: fire-routine
target_skill.description: Fire async Claude Code Routines — "fire scout-r", "fire skill-worker-r", "drain the queue", "routine-fire X". Not for inline scoring/scouting (→ idea-scout) or sync delegation (→ delegate-*).

competing_skills.name: delegate-mechanical
competing_skills.description: Haiku sub-agent for rote bulk work — summarize, extract, scaffold, compress, filter by tag/keyword, scan. Use proactively. Not for judgment (→ delegate-analytical) or async (→ fire-routine).

competing_skills.name: delegate-analytical
competing_skills.description: Sonnet sub-agent for solo judgment — review, compare, rank, evaluate. Use proactively. Not for flaw-finding (→ delegate-adversarial), rote (→ delegate-mechanical), or panel (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: idea-scout
competing_skills.description: Evaluate a raw idea with scoring — "scout this", "what if we built", "is this viable". Auto-fires on new ideas in fresh chats. Not for building (→ architect) or saving without eval (→ idea-vault).

competing_skills.name: grove
competing_skills.description: Capture, browse, update Grove tasks/ideas — "grove this", "what's in grove", "save this idea", "recent activity". Not for iOS reminders (→ add-to-do) or scoring (→ idea-scout, idea-vault).

positive_cases: Fire scout-r on the new idea queue overnight
Drain the routine queue before I head out
Routine-fire ll-data-r for the FEMA integration
Fire skill-worker-r on the delegation family rebuild
negative_cases: Scout this idea right now, inline — is it viable? (expect idea-scout)
Extract every URL from this API response (expect delegate-mechanical)
Compare these three architecture options and rank them (expect delegate-analytical)
What's in grove this morning — any new tasks? (expect grove)
Review this draft pitch for clarity (expect delegate-analytical)
